summary: The AI agent failed to effectively triage the patient's urgent symptoms and exhibited poor handling of patient identity verification, leading to a lack of appropriate follow-up.

issues.title: Failure to Triage Urgent Symptoms
issues.details: The agent did not adequately assess the urgency of the patient's symptoms and failed to schedule an appointment or provide immediate assistance despite the patient's report of chest tightness and shortness of breath.
issues.expected: The agent should have prioritized the patient's symptoms and arranged for an urgent appointment or provided further guidance.

issues.title: Inadequate Patient Identity Verification
issues.details: The agent repeatedly asked for the patient's name and date of birth without confirming the information correctly, leading to confusion and an incomplete verification process.
issues.expected: The agent should have confirmed the patient's identity clearly and efficiently, ensuring that all necessary information was correctly gathered.

issues.title: Ignoring Patient's Responses
issues.details: The agent ignored the patient's confirmation of their phone number and continued to ask for the last name spelling, which was unnecessary and caused frustration.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's confirmation and proceeded with the next steps without redundant questioning.
